el: Badge on the application list marking an application that has been authorized to the current user by someone else (not owned by them).
en: Badge on the application list marking an application that has been authorized to the current user by someone else (not owned by them).
zh: 应用列表中的徽章，标记此应用是由他人授权给当前用户使用，而不是由当前用户拥有。
